message:
feat(ws): enhance WebSocket error messages with examples and docs

Add example and docs fields to WebSocket error messages to help
clients understand and recover from errors:

- ErrorMessage type extended with example and docs fields
- WS_ERROR_HINTS map includes examples and documentation links
- createWSError helper includes new fields in error responses
- ConnectedMessage enhanced with server info, capabilities, and docs

Also add comprehensive tests for message parsing and error hints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
